title: Software Engineer-1
description:
Job Role: SDE 1
   

  

 Location: Hyderabad
   

  

 Employment Type: Full\\-time
   

  

 Experience Level: 2\\+ years
   

  

 ONLY EX\\-AMAZON Can apply
   

  

**Role \\& Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain Java\\-based microservices and RESTful APIs using Spring Boot to support high\\-traffic e\\-commerce platforms.
* Collaborate with product managers, QA engineers, and DevOps to deliver end\\-to\\-end features with a focus on performance, scalability, and maintainability.
* Implement database schemas and optimize queries for SQL and NoSQL data stores to ensure low\\-latency data access.
* Participate in architectural discussions and drive best practices for microservices, containerization, and cloud deployments on AWS.
* Develop automated tests and integrate CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI) to streamline build, test, and deployment processes.
* Troubleshoot production issues, perform root\\-cause analysis, and implement robust monitoring and logging solutions with tools like ELK or Prometheus.


**Skills \\& Qualifications**
 Must\\-Have
   

  

* 2\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in Java development with strong knowledge of Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and related frameworks.
* Proven experience designing and building microservices architectures, RESTful APIs, and distributed systems at scale.
* Expertise in SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, DynamoDB) databases, including query optimization and schema design.
* Solid understanding of AWS services (EC2, ECS/EKS, Lambda, RDS) and infrastructure\\-as\\-code tools such as CloudFormation or Terraform.


**Preferred**
* Experience with containerization and orchestration technologies like Docker and Kubernetes in production environments.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices, CI/CD tooling (Jenkins, GitLab CI) and monitoring solutions (Prometheus, ELK, CloudWatch).


 Benefits \\& Culture Highlights
   

  

* On\\-site work environment fostering close\\-knit collaboration, mentoring, and hands\\-on learning.
* Competitive compensation package with performance\\-based bonuses and comprehensive health benefits.
* Career development programs, technical workshops, and opportunities to work on innovative projects with global impact.

title: Java Software Engineer
description:
Job Overview:
 



 Responsible for the analysis, design, development, and delivery of software solutions.
 



 Define requirements for new applications and customization adhering to Client standards, processes, and best practices.
 



 Develop, customize, and test applications to integrate to MasterCard’s specifications.
 



 Provide leadership, mentoring, and technical training to other team members.
 



  





 Major Accountabilities:
 


* Plan, design, and develop technical solutions and alternatives to meet business requirements in adherence with Client standards, processes, and best practices.
* Lead day to day system development and maintenance activities of the team to meet service level agreements (SLAs) and create solutions with high level of innovation, cost effectiveness, high quality, and faster time to market.
* Accountable for full systems development life cycle including creating high quality requirements documents, use\\-cases, design, and other technical artifacts including but not limited to detailed test strategy/test design, performance benchmarking, release rollout and deployment plans, contingency/back\\-out plans, feasibility study, cost and time analysis and detailed estimates.
* Perform system maintenance, production incident problem management, identification of root cause, remediation of the problems and on\\-call pager support schedule. Select appropriate technical frameworks and solution delivery methodology. Adapt to the technical artifact templates per the needs of the project and technology. Contribute ideas to help ensure that required standards and processes are in place. Maintain solution and technology road maps.
* Research and evaluate current and upcoming technologies and frameworks.
* Participate in POCs (Proof of Concept) and help the Department with selection of Vendor Solutions, Technologies, Methodologies and Frameworks.
* Collaborate with Vendor Resources for Support of Products.
* Conduct brownbag sessions on new and upcoming technologies, methodologies, and application appropriate frameworks. Ensure knowledge transfer of vendor technology to Client staff. Provide technical training to the other team members.
* Follow and promote Quality Assurance and Quality Control processes in the department. Actively look for opportunities to enhance standards and improve process efficiency. Mentor and guide other team members during all phases of the SDLC. Ensure adequate test coverage in Unit Testing, System Testing/Integration Testing and Performance Testing. Perform Quality Inspections and Walkthroughs throughout the SDLC including Requirements Review, Design Review, Code Review and Security Review to ensure compliance with Client standards.



  





 Education:
 


* Bachelor's degree in, Information Systems, Information Technology, Computer Science or Engineering or equivalent.



  





 Knowledge / Experience:
 


* 6 to 10 years of experience in software development using Java and related frameworks.
* 4 to 6 years of experience in delivering secure solutions in Financial Services Sector is preferred.
* Broad understanding of Software Engineering Concepts and Methodologies is required.
* Experience in developing Java 17 based web applications using Spring Framework (6\\.x) or Springboot 3\\.x, and Hibernate (6\\.x) is must.
* Experience in writing efficient SQL queries against either Oracle or PostgreSQL database is must.
* Experience in developing rich web interfaces using React is must, package management using npm, and compilation/building/bundling using Node is desirable.
* Experience in bundling Java based applications/modules using Maven is must.
* Experience with software development using Copilot/Claude/Codex is desirable.
* Exposure to PCF / Azure / AWS is desirable.
* Experience in containerization using Kubernetes is desirable.



  





 Skills/ Abilities:
 


* Must be high\\-energy, detail\\-oriented, proactive, and could function under pressure in an independent environment.
* Must provide the necessary skills to have a high degree of initiative and self\\-motivation to drive results.
* Possesses strong communication skills \\-\\- both verbal and written – and strong relationship, collaborative skills, and organizational skills.
* Willingness and ability to learn and take on challenging opportunities and to work as a member of geographically distributed project team.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Department:** 
 Customer Support
   

  

**Location:** 
 Hyderabad
   

  

**Description**
 Infor are recruiting a Software Developer to join our agile product development team. This role will focus on building scalable, cloud\\-native applications that power business\\-critical functions across diverse industries. You will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy high\\-performance software solutions aligned with Infor’s cloud\\-first strategy.
   

  

**A Typical Day In The Life Includes**
* Design, develop, test, and deploy secure, scalable software solutions using modern development practices.
* Contribute to all stages of the software development lifecycle within an agile environment.
* Collaborate with UX/UI designers, product managers, and QA engineers to deliver high\\-quality features.
* Maintain and improve code quality through continuous integration and automated testing.
* Participate in code reviews and mentor junior team members.
* Identify and resolve performance and scalability issues.
* Stay current on emerging technologies and propose relevant innovations.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Software development experience.
* Experience in one or more programming languages such as Java, Kotlin, C\\#, or Python.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud), microservices, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience of RESTful APIs, CI/CD pipelines, and relational databases.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with enterprise SaaS platforms.
* Experience with DevOps principles and tools such as Jenkins, Terraform, or GitLab CI.
* Experience of domain\\-driven design and event\\-driven architecture.


**About Infor**
 Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn't just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real\\-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you're not just building a career. you're helping to build what's next.
   

  

 Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business\\-wide digital transformation.
   

  

 For more information visit www.infor.com
   

  

**Our Values**
 At Infor, we strive for an environment that is founded on a business philosophy called Principle Based Management™ (PBM™) and eight Guiding Principles: integrity, stewardship \\& compliance, transformation, principled entrepreneurship, knowledge, humility, respect, self\\-actualization.
   

  

 We have a relentless commitment to a culture based on PBM™. Informed by the principles that allow a free and open society to flourish, PBM™ prepares individuals to innovate, improve, and transform while fostering a healthy, growing organization that creates long\\-term value for its clients and supporters and fulfillment for its employees.
   

  

 Infor is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. Infor does not discriminate against candidates or employees because of their sex, race, gender identity, disability, age, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, veteran status, or any other protected status under the law. If you require accommodation or assistance at any time during the application or selection processes, please submit a request by following the directions located in the FAQ section.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Java
description:
Skillset: Java, Data Structures, Algorithms, System Design
 



 Experience level: 6 \\- 10 years
 



 Location: Chennai
 



  





**About Team** 




  





 Walmart’s Corporate Tech and Services is a powerhouse of several exceptional teams delivering world\\-class technology solutions and services making a profound impact at every level of Walmart.
 



  





 As a key part of Walmart Global Tech, our teams set the bar for operational excellence and leverage emerging technology to support millions of customers, associates, and stakeholders worldwide. Each time an associate turns on their laptop, a customer makes a purchase, a new supplier is onboarded, the company closes the books, physical and legal risk is avoided, and when we pay our associates consistently and accurately, that is Corporate Tech. Joining this team means embarking on a journey of limitless growth, relentless innovation, and the chance to set new industry standards that shape the future of Walmart.
 



  





  





**What you will do** 



* Through this role you have an opportunity to design and develop intuitive software that meets and exceeds the needs of the customer and the company.
* Architecture \\& Design Reviews and Code Reviews across teams.
* You also get to collaborate with team members to develop best practices and client requirements for the software.
* Engage with Product Management and Business to drive the agenda, set your priorities and deliver awesome products.
* In this role it would be important for you to professionally maintain all codes, best practices and create updates regularly to address the customer’s and company’s concerns
* You will show your skills in analyzing and testing programs/products before formal launch to ensure flawless performance
* Troubleshooting coding problems quickly and efficiently will offer you a chance to grow your skills in a high\\-pace, high\\-impact environment.
* Software security is of prime importance and by developing programs that monitor sharing of private information, you will be able to add tremendous credibility to your work
* You will also be required to seek ways to improve the software and its effectiveness.
* Participate in hiring and build teams enabling them to be high performing agile teams.



  





**What you will bring** 



* Bachelor’s/Master's degree in Computer Science or related technical field.
* Minimum 6 years of object\\-oriented programming experience in Java, Spring boot, Microservices, React, NestJS, Node.
* Good understanding of Data Structures
* 6 years of experience in systems design, algorithms, and distributed systems.
* Have programming experience preferably in the Finance/ retail / ecommerce industry.
* Python knowledge would be an added advantage
* Exposure to cloud infrastructure, such as Open Stack, Azure, GCP, or AWS
* Experience working in Agile Methodology
* Experience using CI/CD, tools for logging and metrics
* A continuous drive to explore, improve, enhance, automate and optimize systems and tools.
* Strong computer science fundamentals in data structures and algorithms
* Exposure to information retrieval, statistics, and machine learning.
* Excellent oral and written communication skills.



  





**About Walmart Global Tech** 




 Imagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people\\-led and tech\\-empowered.
 



 We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.
 



  





 Walmart’s culture sets us apart, and we know being together helps us innovate, learn and grow great careers. This role is based in our \\[Bangalore/Chennai] office for daily work, with the flexibility for associates to manage their personal lives.
 



  





**Benefits** 




 Beyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include a host of best\\-in\\-class benefits maternity and parental leave, PTO, health benefits, and much more.
 



  





**Belonging** 




 We aim to create a culture where every associate feels valued for who they are, rooted in respect for the individual. Our goal is to foster a sense of belonging, to create opportunities for all our associates, customers and suppliers, and to be a Walmart for everyone.
 



 At Walmart, our vision is "everyone included." By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer** 




 Walmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusive of all people.

title: Back End Engineer
description:
**Role description**

 Job Title: Back End Engineer Location: Bangalore, India (Hybrid) Industry/Field: Retail Experience: 2\\-5 years Company: Tredence About Us: Tredence differentiates itself from other analytics services firms by enabling last mile adoption of insights. We drive true business impact by uniting our strengths in business analytics, data science, and software engineering. We help our clients deliver on the artificial intelligence imperative, in a practical and demystified way. To know more about us, visit: www.tredence.com Job Overview: As a Back End Engineer at Tredence, you will play a pivotal role in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend systems focused on the retail domain. Success in this position means delivering robust, efficient, and high\\-quality backend solutions that enable data\\-driven decision\\-making for our clients. You will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams including data scientists and software engineers to drive practical AI adoption. This role is integral to supporting Tredence’s vision of transforming analytics into real business impact. What will your role look like? \\- Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs using Python frameworks such as Django and Flask. \\- Implement efficient data processing pipelines leveraging libraries like NumPy and Pandas to handle large\\-scale retail data. \\- Collaborate with DevOps teams to deploy and manage applications in Kubernetes environments. \\- Write clean, reusable, and well\\-documented code following object\\-oriented programming principles. \\- Troubleshoot, optimize, and improve existing backend systems to ensure reliability and performance. \\- Participate actively in code reviews, sprint planning, and agile development processes. \\- Work closely with data scientists and frontend engineers to integrate models and deliver end\\-to\\-end analytics solutions. You will need: \\- Demonstrate strong proficiency in Python programming, including data structures and OOPS concepts. \\- Exhibit hands\\-on experience with backend Python frameworks such as Django and Flask. \\- Apply practical knowledge of data manipulation and analysis using Pandas and NumPy. \\- Show familiarity with container orchestration platforms, specifically Kubernetes. \\- Hold a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology (BE/BTech) or equivalent. \\- Possess 2 to 5 years of professional experience in backend engineering or software development roles. Good to Have Skills: \\- Understand RESTful API design and best practices for backend services. \\- Experience working in the retail industry or related domains handling large datasets. \\- Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and their managed Kubernetes services. \\- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks for Python applications. \\- Exposure to other programming languages or frameworks used in data science and analytics. Why you will love this job: \\- Engage in challenging projects that integrate data science and software engineering to solve real\\-world retail problems. \\- Benefit from a hybrid work model balancing remote flexibility with onsite collaboration in Bangalore. \\- Grow your skills through continuous learning opportunities and cross\\-functional teamwork with industry experts. \\- Contribute to a company culture that values innovation, diversity, and measurable business impact. \\- Enjoy a supportive environment fostering career development and work\\-life balance.

title: Lead software Engineer
description:
**This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Lead Software Engineer based in India.**
 In this role, you will contribute to the development of advanced cloud\\-based digital solutions that support critical diagnostic systems used globally in healthcare environments. You will work within a high\\-impact R\\&D engineering team focused on building scalable, secure, and high\\-quality software for regulated medical technologies. The role involves designing end\\-to\\-end solutions, developing robust backend and frontend components, and ensuring performance and reliability in production environments. You will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams including product, QA, DevOps, and domain experts. A strong emphasis is placed on innovation, rapid prototyping, and translating complex requirements into usable software features. This is a hands\\-on leadership role where you will also guide engineering best practices and contribute to architectural decisions in a highly regulated and mission\\-driven domain.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
 In this role, you will be responsible for architecting, designing, developing, and maintaining high\\-quality software solutions for cloud\\-based diagnostic platforms, ensuring performance, scalability, and compliance with regulatory standards. You will take ownership of end\\-to\\-end technical delivery while working closely with cross\\-functional teams.
   

  

* Architect, design, code, test, and debug software applications across backend and frontend systems
* Develop prototypes to validate design concepts and support product innovation discussions
* Investigate and resolve complex technical issues, performing root cause analysis and implementing robust fixes
* Define and promote software engineering best practices including code quality, testing, and documentation standards
* Collaborate with DevOps teams to support CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, and release management
* Work with stakeholders to translate business and clinical requirements into technical solutions


**Requirements**
 The ideal candidate brings strong experience in full\\-stack software engineering with a focus on cloud\\-native applications, along with the ability to operate in regulated and high\\-reliability environments. You should be comfortable working independently while also mentoring others in a collaborative team setup.
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related field
* 7\\+ years of experience in Java/J2EE development
* 2\\+ years of experience in frontend development using Angular or React
* Strong experience with Linux environments, networking fundamentals, and scripting (Python or Shell)
* Hands\\-on experience with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and Git\\-based version control
* 2\\+ years of experience working with Azure cloud technologies or similar cloud platforms
* Strong problem\\-solving, debugging, and analytical skills
* Experience working in Agile environments and cross\\-functional teams
* Exposure to regulated software development (FDA/ISO standards) or medical device systems is a plus


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation package aligned with experience
* Health insurance and wellness programs
* Paid time off and flexible leave policies
* Remote work flexibility for eligible roles
* Learning and development opportunities in advanced cloud and medical technologies
* Exposure to global, high\\-impact healthcare innovation projects
* Career growth within a leading life sciences and diagnostics ecosystem

 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?

This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). title: Senior Staff IT Software Engineer
description:
**Our Mission** 




  





 At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real\\-world problems with cutting\\-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.
 



  





**Who We Are** 




  





 In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Role description**

We drive true business impact by uniting our strengths in business analytics, data science, and software engineering. We help our clients deliver on the artificial intelligence imperative in a practical and demystified way. To know more about us, visit: www.tredence.com Job Overview: As a Senior Full Stack Engineer at Tredence, you will design, develop, and maintain scalable retail analytics solutions that drive actionable insights for our clients. Success in this role means delivering robust, high\\-quality applications that empower business users and support data\\-driven decision\\-making. You will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams, blending business analytics and data science with software engineering expertise. Your contributions will accelerate last mile adoption of AI\\-powered solutions, directly impacting client satisfaction and business growth. What will your role look like? \\- Develop and maintain full stack web applications using Python frameworks such as Django and Flask. \\- Design scalable backend services and APIs to support complex retail analytics workflows. \\- Collaborate with data scientists and business analysts to integrate data\\-driven models and visualizations. \\- Build and optimize SQL queries for efficient data retrieval and transformation. \\- Utilize Microsoft Azure services for cloud deployment, monitoring, and performance tuning. \\- Implement and test RESTful APIs using Postman to ensure robust integration. \\- Develop and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using PowerBI to support decision\\-making. \\- Participate in code reviews, troubleshoot technical issues, and ensure adherence to best practices. You will need: \\- Demonstrate 4\\-8 years of experience in full stack software development, with strong expertise in Python, Django, and Flask frameworks. \\- Apply proficient knowledge of SQL for database design, querying, and optimization. \\- Employ Microsoft Azure cloud platform services for deploying and managing applications. \\- Utilize Postman or similar tools for API testing and validation. \\- Develop data visualizations and reports using PowerBI or equivalent business intelligence tools. \\- Hold a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (BE) or Technology (BTech) or a related technical field. Good to Have Skills: \\- Apply experience with Python libraries such as NumPy for data processing and manipulation. \\- Demonstrate familiarity with retail industry workflows and analytics requirements. \\- Possess knowledge of containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes. \\- Exhibit understanding of agile software development methodologies. \\- Hold relevant certifications in Microsoft Azure or business intelligence platforms. Why you will love this job: Joining Tredence means being part of a forward\\-thinking team that values innovation and practical AI adoption. You will have the opportunity to work on transformative analytics solutions in a hybrid work environment that encourages work\\-life balance. The role offers strong professional growth prospects while collaborating with diverse experts across business analytics, data science, and engineering. You will enhance your skills in cutting\\-edge technologies while delivering measurable impact for leading retail clients.

title: MODULE LEAD - Scala
description:

title: Associate/ Associate Technical Director – UK Building Structures
description:
Description
 



 The Associate – Building Structures will lead and manage the delivery of building structural engineering projects across a range of sectors in the UK. The role involves technical leadership, project management, client engagement, team development, and ensuring high\\-quality design outputs in line with UK standards (Eurocode standards). The Associate will act as a key link between clients, project teams, and senior leadership, driving technical excellence and commercial success.
 



  





 Responsibilities
 



 Technical Leadership \\& Delivery
 



 Lead structural design for medium to large building projects using Eurocodes and UK best practices.
 



 Provide high\\-level technical review and approval of calculations, drawings, and reports.
 



 Drive innovative, safe, and sustainable design solutions.
 



 Ensure compliance with QA/QC procedures and project standards.
 



 Oversee digital engineering tools (Revit, Tekla/structural BIM workflows).
 



  





 2\\. Project Management
 



 Manage full project lifecycle from concept to construction.
 



 Develop scopes, deliverables, programmes, and fee proposals.
 



 Monitor project progress, budgets, risks, and change control.
 



 Coordinate with multidisciplinary design teams (architecture, MEP, civils).
 



 Ensure timely delivery of design information to clients and contractors
 



 3\\. Client Management \\& Business Development
 



 Build strong client relationships through consistent delivery and technical excellence.
 



 Represent the business in client meetings, presentations, design reviews, and coordinationwo rkshops.
 



 Identify new opportunities and support bid development and proposal writing.
 



 Contribute to growth of the structures team through networking and thought leadership.
 



  





  





 4\\. Team Leadership \\& Development
 



 Mentor, coach, and develop engineers and graduates within the structures team.
 



 Lead resource planning, workload distribution, and team coordination.
 



 Promote technical knowledge sharing, CPD, and internal training.
 



 Support talent acquisition by participating in recruitment and interviews
 



 5\\. Construction Support
 



 Provide timely technical responses to RFIs and contractor queries
 



 Attend site inspections, technical audits, and design compliance checks.
 



 Support resolution of construction\\-stage challenges and value engineering options.
 



  





 6\\. Required Skills \\& Experience
 



 Technical Skills
 



 Strong understanding of structural behaviour in steel, RC, masonry, and timber.
 



 Proficiency in design software (ETABS, STAAD, Robot, Tekla Structural Designer, SAFE, RAM).
 



 Experience working in BIM\\-enabled environments (Revit).
 



 Ability to lead technically complex projects independently.
 



  





 Qualifications
 



 Professional Qualifications
 



 Chartered Engineer IStructE (highly desirable) or with ICE.
 



 BEng/MEng/MSc in Civil or Structural Engineering.
 



 Experience
 



 Typically, 15\\+ years of experience in building structure design and delivery.
 



 Proven track record of leading UK\\-based multidisciplinary building projects
 



 Experience with client\\-facing roles and team leadership
 



 Soft Skills
 



 Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
 



 Strong problem\\-solving and decision\\-making capability
 



 Commercial awareness and understanding of project financials.
 



 Ability to manage multiple priorities under pressure.
